name: FORWARD AIR CORP
sic_description: Arrangement of  Transportation of  Freight & Cargo
summary: Part I Overview Forward Air Corporation (Forward, the Company, we, our, or us) is a leading asset-light provider of transportation services. We provide ground transportation, air and ocean forwarding, intermodal drayage services and contract logistics across North and South America, Europe and Asia. We also provide customized asset-light, high-touch logistics and supply chain management solutions with deep customer relationships in high-growth end markets.
